candidate_summary: Chuño-style multi-cycle freeze-thaw-trample distillation: alternate (a) low-LR noise-injection cold-phase, (b) high-LR fine-tune thaw-phase, (c) aggressive prune trample-phase, repeated 6+ cycles to progressively drain low-quality representational mass.

evaluation_rules.combination: strict OR — any one trigger fires a hit

results.title: Chuño — Wikipedia
results.snippet: Source-domain: freeze-thaw + trample cycle for 3 weeks; chuño negro vs blanco.
results.judge_reason: Source-side reference describing the food-preparation process itself with no ML/LLM training-cycle proposal.

results.title: Atlas Obscura — Chuño potatoes by feet
results.snippet: Source-domain: trampling step removes water + skins.
results.judge_reason: Source-side descriptive article about chuño trampling, lacks any LLM training analogue.

results.title: Inca freeze-drying blog
results.judge_reason: Source-side history piece on Inca freeze-drying; no LLM/training methodology overlap.

results.title: Prune&Comp Iterative Pruning + Magnitude Compensation (2025/7)
results.snippet: LLM-side: iterative pruning with magnitude-compensation; multi-step refinement.
results.judge_reason: Iterative pruning + magnitude compensation lacks the explicit triple-phase freeze/thaw/trample cycle with noise-injection cold and high-LR thaw phases.

results.title: Cyclical Loss-Based Optimization for LLM Pretraining on Noisy Data (2025)
results.snippet: LLM-side: cyclical thresholds + filtering noisy samples + loss-based metrics.
results.judge_reason: Cyclical loss-thresholded data filtering on noisy samples differs from three-phase freeze-thaw-prune with explicit pruning trample and noise injection.

results.title: EfficientLLM Pruning-Aware Pretraining (2025/2)
results.snippet: LLM-side: continuous structural optimization during pretraining.
results.judge_reason: Continuous structural pruning during pretraining lacks alternating freeze-thaw-trample cycles with noise-injection cold phase and high-LR thaw fine-tuning.

results.title: Mid-Training of LLMs Survey (2025/10)
results.judge_reason: Annealing-style mid-training is broadly multi-phase but does not specify the chuño-style triple cycle of freeze(noise)/thaw(high-LR)/trample(prune) repeated 6+ times.

results.title: Unlearning via Gradient Ratio + Noise Injection (2025/8)
results.judge_reason: Single-purpose unlearning noise injection differs from the proposed three-phase repeating freeze-thaw-prune cyclic training schedule.

notes: Source-domain hits (results 1-3) align on chuño keywords as expected but contain no ML method; LLM-side results (4-8) each touch one isolated component (pruning, cyclical filtering, multi-phase mid-training, or noise injection) but none combines all three phases (noise-injection freeze + high-LR thaw + aggressive pruning trample) in a repeating 6+ cycle schedule. No single result triggers functional_equivalence >= 0.7, semantic_cosine >= 0.7, or keyword_overlap >= 2 on the LLM side, so under strict OR the candidate passes.
